name: Micro-Wave Peanut Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together peanuts, sugar, corn syrup, salt in a microwave-safe bowl.
2. Cook on high for 4 minutes.
3. Stir the mixture well and cook an additional 4 minutes.
4. Add butter and vanilla to the peanut mixture. Stir until fully blended.
5. Return the mixture to the microwave and cook for 2 more minutes.
(Peanuts will be slightly browned, and syrup will be hot).
6. Add baking soda and gently stir until foamy.
7. Pour the brittle onto a sheet of aluminum foil.
8. Allow it to cool completely.
9. Break into pieces and store in an airtight container.
